name: sentry
description: Sentry Plugin for Codex to help with debugging including MCP and skill capabilities.

interface.shortDescription: Set up Sentry, debug production issues, and configure monitoring.
interface.longDescription: Teach your AI coding assistant how to use Sentry: SDK setup wizards for any platform, production issue debugging via the Sentry MCP server, code review with Sentry context, and monitoring configuration.
defaultPrompt: What are the top Sentry errors in the last 24 hours?
